card.tiger.title: TIGER 코리아 AI 전력기기 TOP3 플러스
card.tiger.summary: We are investing heavily in the three key domestic power equipment companies (LS일렉트릭, HD현대일렉트릭, 효성중공업), which are the biggest beneficiaries of the AI data center expansion and North American power grid replacement super cycle.
card.kodexTr.title: KODEX 200TR
card.kodexTr.summary: This product tracks the KOSPI 200 index but automatically reinvests generated dividends to maximize the compounding effect of long-term investment.
card.kodex.title: KODEX 200
card.kodex.summary: We create stable dividend cash flow with the most representative market index, ETF, which diversifies investments in 200 of Korea's leading blue-chip companies.
section.weights.title: 🥧 Proportion of core constituents by ETF (TOP 5)
section.semi.title: 🇰🇷 Semiconductor Leaders Driving Indexes and ETFs
semi.samsung.title: 📱 삼성전자 (005930)
semi.samsung.summary: Led the memory semiconductor cycle rebound by beginning mass production of the HBM3E 12-layer and passing the NVIDIA Qualtest. With a weight of 30% in the KOSPI index, KOSPI, KODEX 200, and KODEX 200TR are key stocks that directly affect the overall returns.
semi.sk.title: 💾 SK하이닉스 (000660)
semi.sk.summary: The largest beneficiary of the explosive demand for AI data centers, with the largest market share in the global HBM market (approximately 50-55%). By exclusively supplying HBM3E to NVIDIA, it has established itself as a key beneficiary of the AI semiconductor super cycle.

section.radar.subtitle: The relative investment attractiveness of each ETF is visualized in a radar chart using five indicators: growth potential, stability, dividend compounding effect, AI exposure, and export momentum.
section.power.title: ⚡ Global AI data center power demand forecast (TWh)
section.power.subtitle: AI Electricity demand is expected to increase approximately 2.5 times by 2030 compared to 2022 due to the explosion in computing demand. This is the core investment basis for TIGER AI전력기기 ETF.

card.tiger.momentum: 📌 Core Momentum Demand for power grid upgrades is explosively increasing due to expansion of global AI infrastructure investment. Thanks to the benefits of the US IRA (Inflation Reduction Act) and the European Green Deal, the export order backlog of the three domestic power equipment companies is at an all-time high. Due to the concentrated nature of the portfolio, there is a high possibility of excess returns compared to the market during periods of strong thematic momentum.
card.tiger.risk: ⚠️ Investment Risk Concentration in the top three stocks is about 75% or more, which means high volatility. AI There is a risk of a sharp decline if the investment cycle slows or global interest rates rise. A split buying strategy is recommended when entering a short-term overheated period.
card.tiger.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy Due to the thematic nature of ETF, it is recommended to be incorporated within 10-20% of the portfolio. Rather than short-term trading, it is more advantageous to approach the AI·Power Infrastructure Supercycle from a long-term perspective of 6 to 18 months.
card.kodexTr.momentum: 📌 Core Momentum With an automatic dividend reinvestment (total return) structure, long-term compound interest rates are higher than KODEX 200, which tracks the same index. The average dividend yield of approximately 2-3% for KOSPI 200 constituents is automatically reflected in NAV, allowing you to enjoy the compound interest effect without additional tax.
card.kodexTr.risk: ⚠️ Investment Risk It carries the same downside risk as the KOSPI 200 index itself. The two stocks 삼성전자 and SK하이닉스 account for more than 40% of the total and are sensitive to the semiconductor industry, and downward pressure may increase in the event of an exchange rate or global economic downturn.
card.kodexTr.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy Product optimized for long-term savings investment (DCA). Since you can enjoy the effect of compound interest without paying dividend income tax, it is suitable as a core stock in a long-term portfolio for more than 10 years. We recommend a strategy of automatically buying a certain amount every month.
card.kodex.momentum: 📌 Core Momentum The main momentum is the movement to resolve the KOSPI index's undervaluation (easing Korea's discount) and the expansion of foreign capital inflow. With the introduction of the domestic value up program, the treasury stock cancellation and dividend expansion policy has been strengthened, and the shareholder return rate of ETF constituent stocks is increasing.
card.kodex.risk: ⚠️ Investment Risk Dividend income tax (15.4%) is incurred when dividends are paid, and dividend reinvestment efficiency is lower than that of the TR structure. The decline may be significant in situations such as a global economic downturn, a weak won, or geopolitical risks (tensions on the Korean Peninsula).
card.kodex.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy Suitable for investors who need cash flow. It is advantageous for a withdrawal strategy of directly reinvesting dividends after receiving them or using them for living expenses. Due to the highest trading volume, it can also be used for short-term market response purposes.
semi.samsung.point: 📌 Investment points ① Normalization of HBM business: HBM sales are expected to increase rapidly from 2025 to 2026 due to the development of 16-layer HBM3E and expansion of NVIDIA supply. ② Foundry rebound: The gap with TSMC is narrowing due to improved GAA (3nm) process yield. ③ Strengthening shareholder returns: The increase in the size of treasury stock cancellations under the value-up program is a factor supporting the stock price downward.
semi.samsung.risk: ⚠️ Key risks Sustainability of foundry deficits, strengthening of China's semiconductor export regulations, and risk of re-entering the memory industry inventory adjustment cycle. A fall in the exchange rate (strong won) will have a negative impact on 삼성전자, which has a high proportion of exports.
semi.samsung.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy Buying opportunity when HBM supply expansion official news or foundry profit conversion announcement. From a long-term split buying perspective, PBR 1.0x or less is the historically low buying point.
semi.sk.point: 📌 Investment points ① HBM Unrivaled Competitiveness: Expected to maintain technological superiority from 2026 to 2027 by leading the development of HBM4. ② Highest performance ever: Targeting operating profit margin in the 30% range due to increase in HBM·DDR5 ASP due to demand for AI. ③ Operation of Indiana plant in the U.S.: Hedging export regulation risks and diversifying big tech customers through local production.
semi.sk.risk: ⚠️ Key risks 삼성전자·Micron's market dominance may be weakened as it pursues HBM. Customer concentration (excessive dependence on NVIDIA on a single customer). AI Possibility of a sharp turnaround in the industry if investment bubble theory spreads. Risk of strengthening export regulations on semiconductor materials and equipment.
semi.sk.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy AI In conjunction with the infrastructure investment expansion cycle, pay attention to big tech earnings announcement season such as Nvidia, Microsoft, and Amazon. Use the period of increased volatility before and after quarterly earnings announcement as an opportunity to buy installments.
exports.def.momentum: 📌 Core Momentum Due to the prolongation of the Russian-Russian war, the defense industry budget of European NATO member countries surged to more than GDP 2%. Exports of K2 tanks and K9 self-propelled guns to Poland, Romania, Australia, etc. are reaching an all-time high. The price-performance (cost-effectiveness) advantage of Korean defense companies is highly regarded in the global market.
exports.def.risk: ⚠️ Precautions Possibility of a slowdown in demand when geopolitical tensions ease (end-of-war negotiations, etc.). Stock prices plummet when export contract execution is delayed and quality issues occur. Exchange rate fluctuations affect the conversion of export proceeds.
exports.def.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy Effective pre-purchase strategy ahead of large export contract announcement event. Approach to select stocks with abundant order backlog, such as 한화에어로·LIG넥스원·현대로템.
exports.ship.momentum: 📌 Core Momentum Due to the rapid increase in orders for eco-friendly special ships such as LNG carriers and ammonia carriers, the order backlog exceeds 3-4 years' worth. The three Korean shipbuilding companies (HD현대, 삼성중공업, 한화오션) have a high technological monopoly, dominating orders for high value-added ships compared to their Chinese competitors. The ship ordering cycle is expected to continue to boom from 2026 to 2028.
exports.ship.risk: ⚠️ Precautions Concerns about worsening profitability when steel (heavy plate) prices soar. Even if there is a large backlog of orders, actual sales are recognized several years later. The risk of low-price aggressiveness and technological catch-up by Chinese shipbuilders remains.
exports.ship.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy It is advantageous to add to the stock at the beginning of the ship price increase cycle. A long-term holding approach is recommended, focusing on large-cap stocks with a solid order backlog, such as HD현대중공업·HD한국조선 Marine.
exports.aero.momentum: 📌 Core Momentum With the success of Nuri and the launch of 한국항공우주청 (KASA), the national space development budget was significantly expanded. With the growth of the low-orbit satellite communication (LEO) market, demand for satellite communication equipment such as 인텔리안테크 and AP위성 is increasing. Amid synergy with the defense industry, exports of aircraft and satellites of 한화에어로 and 한국항공우주 (KAI) are expected to expand.
exports.aero.risk: ⚠️ Precautions The space business requires enormous development costs and takes a long time to commercialize. There is a large technological gap with global leading companies such as SpaceX, and performance is greatly linked to changes in government budget policies.
exports.aero.strategy: ✅ Investment Strategy This is the initial phase of the theme and volatility is high. It is safe to limit the proportion in the portfolio to within 5-10% and take a split approach using government contracts and successful satellite launch events as catalysts.
